tagline.en: The largest animal ever to live on Earth
tagline.zh: 地球上有史以来最大的动物

tagline.en: Sings haunting songs that travel thousands of miles
tagline.zh: 歌声能传播数千英里的歌唱家

viewingSpots.name: 银行浅滩，多米尼加共和国

tagline.en: Apex predator with complex culture passed across generations
tagline.zh: 拥有代际传承文化的顶级掠食者

tagline.en: The ocean's most iconic predator with electroreception
tagline.zh: 拥有电感应能力的海洋最具标志性掠食者

tagline.en: The world's largest fish — gentle filter-feeder
tagline.zh: 世界上最大的鱼——温柔的滤食者

tagline.en: Navigates thousands of miles to nest on its birth beach
tagline.zh: 跋涉数千英里回到出生地的海滩产卵

tagline.en: Lives safely among the stinging tentacles of sea anemones
tagline.zh: 安然栖息在海葵的刺触手之间

tagline.en: Highly intelligent social mammals that call each other by name
tagline.zh: 高度智慧的社会性哺乳动物，能以名字互相呼唤

tagline.en: Three hearts, blue blood, and nine brains
tagline.zh: 三颗心脏、蓝色血液和九个大脑

tagline.en: Dives 3 km deep to battle giant squid in the abyss
tagline.zh: 能潜入3公里深处与巨型鱿鱼搏斗

tagline.en: The largest living turtle — crosses entire oceans
tagline.zh: 现存最大的海龟——横渡整个大洋

tagline.en: The 'canary of the sea' — most vocal of all whales
tagline.zh: "海洋金丝雀"——所有鲸类中最善鸣叫的

tagline.en: The 'unicorn of the sea' with a spiraling ivory tusk
tagline.zh: 拥有螺旋象牙角的"海洋独角兽"

tagline.en: The gentle 'sea cow' that inspired mermaid legends
tagline.zh: 启发美人鱼传说的温柔"海牛"

tagline.en: Uses rocks as tools and holds hands while sleeping
tagline.zh: 会用石头当工具，睡觉时手牵手

viewingSpots.name: 托菲诺，不列颠哥伦比亚

tagline.en: Wingspan up to 7 meters — the ocean's largest ray
tagline.zh: 翼展可达7米——海洋中最大的鳐鱼

viewingSpots.name: Isla de la Plata，厄瓜多尔

tagline.en: Hammer-shaped head gives 360-degree binocular vision
tagline.zh: 锤状头部提供360度双目视觉

tagline.en: Eats anything — nicknamed the garbage can of the sea
tagline.zh: 什么都吃——被称为海洋垃圾桶

tagline.en: The only shark that thrives in freshwater rivers
tagline.zh: 唯一能在淡水河流中繁衍的鲨鱼

tagline.en: The second-largest fish — cruises with mouth agape
tagline.zh: 世界第二大鱼——张着大嘴巡游

tagline.en: Critically endangered — its beak-like mouth eats sponges on reefs
tagline.zh: 极度濒危——鹰嘴般的嘴在珊瑚礁上啃食海绵

tagline.en: Migrates across the entire Pacific Ocean as a hatchling
tagline.zh: 幼时就横越整个太平洋

tagline.en: Survives Antarctic winter — dives deeper than any other bird
tagline.zh: 能在南极冬季存活——比其他所有鸟类潜得更深

tagline.en: Makes the longest migration of any mammal — 20,000 km round trip
tagline.zh: 进行哺乳动物中最远的迁徙——往返2万公里

tagline.en: Second-largest animal alive — asymmetrically colored jaw
tagline.zh: 现存第二大动物——下颚颜色左右不对称

tagline.en: The real 'Dory' — vibrant royal blue with a yellow tail
tagline.zh: 真正的"多莉"——亮丽的宝蓝色配黄色尾巴

tagline.en: Males get pregnant and give birth to live young
tagline.zh: 雄性怀孕并产下活的幼仔

tagline.en: The heaviest bony fish — a two-ton pancake that sunbathes at the surface
tagline.zh: 最重的硬骨鱼——两吨重的煎饼在水面晒太阳

tagline.en: Spectacular venomous beauty — a devastating invasive species
tagline.zh: 华丽有毒的美丽生物——毁灭性的入侵物种

tagline.en: Warm-blooded torpedo — a single fish can sell for millions
tagline.zh: 温血鱼雷——一条鱼可以卖到数百万

tagline.en: Slashes through schools of fish at 100 km/h with its sword-like bill
tagline.zh: 以100公里时速挥舞剑状吻部冲入鱼群

tagline.en: Critically endangered — slashes prey with a saw-studded snout
tagline.zh: 极度濒危——用布满锯齿的吻部击杀猎物

tagline.en: The largest reef fish — grows big enough to swallow a small shark
tagline.zh: 最大的珊瑚礁鱼——大到可以吞下小型鲨鱼

tagline.en: The majestic Napoleon wrasse — king of the coral reef
tagline.zh: 雄伟的拿破仑隆头鱼——珊瑚礁之王

tagline.en: Juveniles and adults look like completely different species
tagline.zh: 幼鱼和成鱼看起来像完全不同的物种

tagline.en: Gentle giant that grazes on seagrass like an underwater cow
tagline.zh: 像水下的牛一样温柔地啃食海草

viewingSpots.name: Blue Spring State Park，佛罗里达

tagline.en: Spotted eagle ray — leaps fully out of the water when excited
tagline.zh: 花点鹰鳐——兴奋时会完全跃出水面

tagline.en: The real 'Gill' from Finding Nemo — the Moorish idol
tagline.zh: 《海底总动员》中"吉哥"的原型——镰鱼

tagline.en: Silver lightning bolt that strikes with terrifying speed
tagline.zh: 银色闪电——以惊人速度发起攻击

tagline.en: Lives over 200 years — the longest-lived mammal on Earth
tagline.zh: 寿命超过200年——地球上最长寿的哺乳动物

tagline.en: Tusked giant of the Arctic — can weigh over 1,500 kg
tagline.zh: 北极的长牙巨兽——体重可超过1500公斤

tagline.en: The curious 'puppy of the sea' found in harbors worldwide
tagline.zh: "海中小狗"——好奇心旺盛，遍布全球港口

tagline.en: The fastest fish in the ocean — clocked at 110 km/h
tagline.zh: 海洋中速度最快的鱼——时速达110公里

tagline.en: Spins up to 7 times in a single leap out of the water
tagline.zh: 一次跃出水面能旋转多达7圈

tagline.en: Gathers in superpods of over 10,000 individuals
tagline.zh: 聚集成超过一万只的超级群

tagline.en: Turns pink with age — Hong Kong's beloved mascot
tagline.zh: 随年龄变粉——香港的吉祥物

tagline.en: Males weigh 4 tonnes — the largest seal and deepest-diving pinniped
tagline.zh: 雄性体重4吨——最大的海豹和潜水最深的鳍足类

tagline.en: Biomass exceeds all humans combined — keystone of Antarctic food web
tagline.zh: 总生物量超过全人类——南极食物网的基石

tagline.en: Forms shimmering bait balls that feed entire ocean ecosystems
tagline.zh: 形成闪亮的饵球，养活整个海洋生态系统

tagline.en: The most caught fish on Earth — drives the Humboldt Current ecosystem
tagline.zh: 地球上捕获量最大的鱼——驱动洪堡海流生态系统

tagline.en: The fish that shaped human history — fueled the Age of Exploration
tagline.zh: 改变人类历史的鱼——推动了大航海时代

tagline.en: Returns from the ocean to the exact stream where it was born
tagline.zh: 从海洋返回出生时的那条溪流

tagline.en: The king salmon — largest of the Pacific salmon species
tagline.zh: 帝王鲑——太平洋鲑鱼中体型最大的

tagline.en: Reef architect — builds the structures that house thousands of species
tagline.zh: 珊瑚礁建筑师——构建容纳数千物种的结构

tagline.en: The 'weed' of coral reefs — first to colonize, first to bleach
tagline.zh: 珊瑚礁的"杂草"——最先殖民，也最先白化

tagline.en: Massive boulder corals that can live for 1,000 years
tagline.zh: 巨大的团块珊瑚，寿命可达1000年

tagline.en: Shimmering clouds above coral heads — the heartbeat of the reef
tagline.zh: 珊瑚头顶闪烁的云彩——珊瑚礁的心跳

tagline.en: The original clownfish — fiercely territorial despite its tiny size
tagline.zh: 最初的小丑鱼——体型虽小，领地意识极强

tagline.en: The reef's dentist — cleans parasites from fish that line up patiently
tagline.zh: 珊瑚礁的牙医——鱼类排队等它清理寄生虫

tagline.en: Coral-eating starfish whose outbreaks devastate entire reefs
tagline.zh: 食珊瑚海星——大爆发时摧毁整片珊瑚礁

tagline.en: Electric blue starfish that can regrow its entire body from one arm
tagline.zh: 电光蓝海星——一只腕足就能再生整个身体

tagline.en: The largest living bivalve — weighs over 200 kg and lives 100+ years
tagline.zh: 现存最大的双壳贝——重超200公斤，寿命逾百年

tagline.en: Marches in single-file lines across the ocean floor during migration
tagline.zh: 迁徙时在海底排成单列行进

tagline.en: Biologically immortal — never stops growing throughout its life
tagline.zh: 生物学上不死——一生都在不断生长

tagline.en: The blue crab — backbone of Chesapeake Bay's ecosystem and economy
tagline.zh: 蓝蟹——切萨皮克湾生态系统和经济的支柱

tagline.en: Armored giant of Arctic seas — leg span over 1.5 meters
tagline.zh: 北极海域的装甲巨兽——腿展超过1.5米

tagline.en: The black tiger prawn — most farmed crustacean on Earth
tagline.zh: 黑虎虾——地球上养殖最多的甲壳类

tagline.en: Grows 60 cm per day — creates underwater forests taller than trees
tagline.zh: 每天生长60厘米——创造比树还高的水下森林

tagline.en: Kelp forest nemesis — overgrazing turns forests into urchin barrens
tagline.zh: 海藻林克星——过度啃食使森林变成荒芜之地

tagline.en: Born in the Sargasso Sea — nobody has ever seen them mate
tagline.zh: 出生在马尾藻海——从未有人见过它们交配

tagline.en: The largest flatfish — can exceed 2 meters and 300 kg
tagline.zh: 最大的比目鱼——可超过2米、300公斤

tagline.en: Sardine run in South Africa — billions create one of nature's greatest spectacles
tagline.zh: 南非沙丁鱼大迁徙——数十亿条创造自然最壮观景象

tagline.en: Ethereal moon jellyfish — drifting through every ocean on Earth
tagline.zh: 飘渺的月亮水母——漂浮在地球的每个海洋

tagline.en: Tentacles stretch over 30 meters — longer than a blue whale
tagline.zh: 触手超过30米——比蓝鲸还长

tagline.en: Not one animal but a colony — sails the surface with a gas-filled float
tagline.zh: 不是一个动物而是群体——用充气浮囊在水面航行

tagline.en: Masters of disguise — change color, texture and shape in milliseconds
tagline.zh: 伪装大师——毫秒内改变颜色、纹理和形状

tagline.en: Humboldt squid — hunts in packs and flashes red when aggressive
tagline.zh: 洪堡鱿鱼——成群猎食，攻击时闪烁红色

tagline.en: Jet-propelled hunter of the open ocean with excellent vision
tagline.zh: 喷射推进的远洋猎手，视觉极佳

tagline.en: One of the smallest cetaceans — shy harbor dweller
tagline.zh: 最小的鲸类之一——害羞的港湾居民

tagline.en: The 'old man of the sea' — dominant seal of the North Atlantic
tagline.zh: "海中老人"——北大西洋的霸主海豹

tagline.en: Survives on krill — population indicator for Antarctic ecosystem health
tagline.zh: 以磷虾为生——南极生态系统健康的指标

tagline.en: Lives further south than any mammal — chews through ice to breathe
tagline.zh: 生活在比任何哺乳动物更南的地方——咬穿冰层呼吸

tagline.en: Fluffy white pups on Arctic ice — symbol of wildlife conservation
tagline.zh: 北极冰面上毛茸茸的白色幼崽——野生动物保护的象征

tagline.en: Antarctic toothfish — antifreeze proteins keep its blood liquid below 0 degrees
tagline.zh: 南极犬牙鱼——防冻蛋白使血液在零下仍保持液态

tagline.en: Antarctic icefish relative — evolved in waters colder than a refrigerator
tagline.zh: 南极冰鱼近亲——在比冰箱更冷的水中进化

tagline.en: Giant tube worm — thrives at volcanic vents without sunlight or a mouth
tagline.zh: 巨型管虫——在火山热泉中无需阳光和嘴巴即可繁衍

tagline.en: Eyeless shrimp that swarms around superheated deep-sea vents
tagline.zh: 无眼虾——成群聚集在超高温深海热泉周围

tagline.en: Survives 80 degrees C — the most heat-tolerant animal on Earth
tagline.zh: 能承受80度——地球上最耐高温的动物

tagline.en: A single oyster filters 200 liters of water per day
tagline.zh: 一只牡蛎每天过滤200升水

tagline.en: Glues itself to rocks with the strongest biological adhesive known
tagline.zh: 用已知最强的生物粘合剂将自己粘在岩石上

tagline.en: Living fossil unchanged for 450 million years — its blue blood saves human lives
tagline.zh: 4.5亿年未变的活化石——蓝色血液拯救人类生命

tagline.en: Inflates into a spine-covered ball to deter predators
tagline.zh: 膨胀成布满刺的球体来吓退捕食者

tagline.en: Iconic reef fish — forms massive spawning aggregations
tagline.zh: 标志性珊瑚礁鱼——形成大规模产卵聚集

tagline.en: Goliath grouper — produces a booming sound to defend its territory
tagline.zh: 歌利亚石斑鱼——发出轰鸣声保卫领地

tagline.en: Bites coral and poops sand — creates tropical beaches grain by grain
tagline.zh: 咬珊瑚拉白沙——一粒粒创造热带沙滩

tagline.en: Has a second set of jaws in its throat — like the Alien movie
tagline.zh: 喉咙里有第二副颌——就像《异形》电影

tagline.en: The docile nurse shark — rests in piles on the reef floor
tagline.zh: 温顺的护士鲨——在礁底堆叠休息

tagline.en: The wobbegong — a flat, tasseled ambush predator of Australian reefs
tagline.zh: 毯鲨——澳大利亚珊瑚礁上扁平的流苏伏击者

tagline.en: Elegant leopard shark — changes from striped juvenile to spotted adult
tagline.zh: 优雅的豹纹鲨——从条纹幼鱼变为斑点成鱼

tagline.en: The peacock grouper — electric blue spots on a fiery orange body
tagline.zh: 孔雀石斑鱼——火红身体上点缀电蓝色斑点

tagline.en: Queen triggerfish — locks itself into crevices with a dorsal spine
tagline.zh: 女王鳞鲀——用背棘将自己锁在缝隙中

tagline.en: Sleeps in a mucus cocoon to hide its scent from nocturnal predators
tagline.zh: 睡在黏液茧中，向夜间捕食者隐藏气味

tagline.en: Neon rainbow wrasse — the busiest fish on the reef
tagline.zh: 霓虹彩虹隆头鱼——珊瑚礁上最忙碌的鱼

tagline.en: Regal angelfish — striped in royal blue, white, and orange
tagline.zh: 皇家神仙鱼——蓝、白、橙条纹

tagline.en: Brilliant yellow tang — most popular aquarium fish in the world
tagline.zh: 亮丽的黄刺尾鲷——世界上最受欢迎的观赏鱼

tagline.en: Powder blue surgeonfish — a territorial gem of Indian Ocean reefs
tagline.zh: 粉蓝刺尾鲷——印度洋珊瑚礁的领地宝石

tagline.en: Picasso triggerfish — named after the artist for its abstract markings
tagline.zh: 毕加索鳞鲀——因抽象花纹以画家命名

tagline.en: The flame angelfish — a blazing jewel of Pacific reefs
tagline.zh: 火焰神仙鱼——太平洋珊瑚礁的燃烧宝石

tagline.en: Smaller than a fingernail — perfectly camouflaged on sea fans
tagline.zh: 比指甲还小——在海扇上完美伪装

tagline.en: Endemic to Lake Baikal — evolved in the world's deepest lake
tagline.zh: 贝加尔湖特有种——在世界最深湖泊中进化

viewingSpots.name: 贝加尔湖利斯特维扬卡

tagline.en: Largest freshwater fish — must surface to breathe air
tagline.zh: 最大的淡水鱼——必须浮出水面呼吸空气

tagline.en: Generates 860-volt shocks — enough to stun a horse
tagline.zh: 产生860伏电击——足以击晕一匹马

tagline.en: Infamous for feeding frenzies — actually a timid schooling fish
tagline.zh: 以疯狂进食闻名——实际上是胆小的群居鱼

tagline.en: Leaps out of the water to snatch insects and birds from branches
tagline.zh: 跃出水面从树枝上抢食昆虫和鸟类

tagline.en: Beautiful spotted freshwater stingray of the Amazon basin
tagline.zh: 亚马逊流域美丽的斑点淡水魟

tagline.en: The 'king of the aquarium' — feeds its fry from body mucus
tagline.zh: "水族之王"——用体表黏液喂养幼鱼

tagline.en: Most farmed fish on Earth — feeds hundreds of millions
tagline.zh: 地球上养殖最多的鱼——养活数亿人

tagline.en: Nile perch — an invasive giant that transformed Lake Victoria's ecosystem
tagline.zh: 尼罗河鲈——改变维多利亚湖生态的入侵巨鱼

tagline.en: Survives drought by burrowing into mud and breathing air for years
tagline.zh: 通过钻入泥中呼吸空气度过数年干旱

tagline.en: The speckled peacock bass — apex predator of Amazonian rivers
tagline.zh: 皇帝孔雀鲈——亚马逊河流的顶级掠食者

tagline.en: Scribbled pipefish — male carries eggs in a brood pouch like seahorses
tagline.zh: 涂鸦海龙——雄性像海马一样用育儿袋孵蛋

tagline.en: Greater pipefish — master of camouflage in seagrass beds
tagline.zh: 大海龙——海草床的伪装大师

tagline.en: Reef manta ray — each one has unique belly markings like fingerprints
tagline.zh: 礁蝠鲼——每一只的腹部花纹都像指纹般独特

tagline.en: Arrives in mass nesting events called 'arribadas' — thousands at once
tagline.zh: 成千上万同时上岸集体产卵——壮观的"抵达"

tagline.en: Uses sponges as tools to dig for food — culture passed mother to daughter
tagline.zh: 用海绵当工具觅食——母女传承的文化

tagline.en: Literally 'vampire squid from hell' — turns inside out when threatened
tagline.zh: 字面意思"来自地狱的吸血鬼鱿鱼"——受威胁时把身体翻过来

tagline.en: The 'Dumbo octopus' — flaps ear-like fins 4,000 m below the surface
tagline.zh: "小飞象章鱼"——在水下4000米用耳朵般的鳍游泳

tagline.en: Has a transparent head — you can see its brain through its skull
tagline.zh: 拥有透明头部——你可以透过头骨看到它的大脑

tagline.en: Voted 'world's ugliest animal' — actually looks normal at depth
tagline.zh: 被选为"世界上最丑的动物"——在深海其实长相正常

tagline.en: The longest bony fish — up to 11 meters — inspired sea serpent legends
tagline.zh: 最长的硬骨鱼——长达11米——海蛇传说的灵感来源

tagline.en: Giant squid — eyes the size of dinner plates to see in the abyss
tagline.zh: 大王乌贼——眼睛像餐盘大小，在深渊中观察

tagline.en: The 'blue dragon' — eats venomous jellyfish and steals their stingers
tagline.zh: "蓝龙"——吃有毒水母并偷走它们的刺细胞

tagline.en: Weedy seadragon — looks like a piece of kelp come to life
tagline.zh: 叶海龙——看起来像一片活过来的海藻

tagline.en: Leafy seadragon — the most ornate fish in the sea, festooned with frills
tagline.zh: 草海龙——海洋中最华丽的鱼，装饰着褶边

tagline.en: Golf-ball-sized but carries enough venom to kill 26 adults
tagline.zh: 只有高尔夫球大小，毒素却能杀死26个成年人

tagline.en: The mandarinfish — psychedelic patterns with no scales, only toxic slime
tagline.zh: 七彩麒麟——迷幻花纹无鳞片，只有有毒黏液

tagline.en: Black dragonfish — females have fangs and a bioluminescent barbel
tagline.zh: 黑柔骨鱼——雌鱼有獠牙和发光的触须

tagline.en: Deep-sea anglerfish — male fuses permanently to the female's body
tagline.zh: 深海鮟鱇——雄鱼永久融入雌鱼体内

tagline.en: Fangtooth — has the largest teeth relative to body size of any fish
tagline.zh: 尖牙鱼——牙齿与身体的比例是所有鱼类中最大的

tagline.en: Viperfish — needle-like fangs so long it cannot close its mouth
tagline.zh: 蝰鱼——针状獠牙太长以至于无法闭嘴

tagline.en: Pelican eel — mouth opens wider than its entire body
tagline.zh: 鹈鹕鳗——嘴能张得比整个身体还大

tagline.en: Footballfish — a nightmarish anglerfish occasionally washed ashore
tagline.zh: 足球鱼——偶尔被冲上海岸的噩梦鮟鱇

tagline.en: Barreleye with tubular eyes that look straight up through its head
tagline.zh: 管眼鱼——管状眼睛直接向上透过头部观察

tagline.en: Banded sea krait — 10x more venomous than a cobra but incredibly docile
tagline.zh: 阔带青斑海蛇——毒性是眼镜蛇的10倍但极其温顺

tagline.en: Most widespread snake on Earth — found across the entire Pacific
tagline.zh: 地球上分布最广的蛇——遍布整个太平洋

tagline.en: Neon-green-and-black nudibranch — toxic and proud of it
tagline.zh: 霓虹绿黑色海蛞蝓——有毒且引以为傲

tagline.en: A living jewel — translucent blue body with black and gold trim
tagline.zh: 活宝石——半透明蓝色身体配黑金镶边

tagline.en: The tongue-eating louse — replaces a fish's tongue and lives in its mouth
tagline.zh: 食舌虱——替换鱼的舌头并住在它嘴里

viewingSpots.name: Gulf of 加利福尼亚，墨西哥

tagline.en: Living fossil unchanged for 500 million years — shell is a mathematical spiral
tagline.zh: 5亿年未变的活化石——壳是数学的对数螺旋

tagline.en: Thought extinct for 65 million years — rediscovered alive in 1938
tagline.zh: 被认为灭绝6500万年——1938年被重新发现

tagline.en: Pacific sea nettle — trailing 5-meter golden tentacles like a living lantern
tagline.zh: 太平洋海荨麻——拖着5米金色触手如活灯笼

viewingSpots.name: 俄勒冈海岸 水族馆

tagline.en: The immortal jellyfish — can reverse aging and revert to its juvenile form
tagline.zh: 不死水母——能逆转衰老回到幼年形态

tagline.en: Punches at the speed of a bullet — sees 16 types of color receptors vs our 3
tagline.zh: 以子弹速度出拳——拥有16种色觉感受器，人类只有3种

tagline.en: Warty frogfish — uses a built-in fishing rod to lure prey to its mouth
tagline.zh: 疣状躄鱼——用自带的"钓鱼竿"将猎物引到嘴边

tagline.en: Weedy scorpionfish — a psychedelic ambush predator worth thousands to divers
tagline.zh: 前鳍吻鲉——迷幻伏击者，潜水员梦寐以求的拍摄对象

tagline.en: Stonefish — the most venomous fish, perfectly disguised as a rock
tagline.zh: 石鱼——最毒的鱼，完美伪装成一块石头

tagline.en: Blue-spotted ribbontail ray — electric blue polka dots on golden skin
tagline.zh: 蓝点魟——金色皮肤上的电蓝色波尔卡圆点

tagline.en: Yellowhead jawfish — male incubates eggs in its mouth for weeks
tagline.zh: 黄头颚鱼——雄鱼在嘴中孵卵数周

tagline.en: Carnation coral — cannot photosynthesize, feeds on plankton passing by
tagline.zh: 康乃馨珊瑚——不能光合作用，靠捕食路过的浮游生物

tagline.en: A hollow tube of light made of thousands of cloned animals
tagline.zh: 由数千个克隆体组成的空心发光管

tagline.en: Sharkray — half shark, half ray, fully bizarre
tagline.zh: 鲨鳐——半鲨半鳐，完全奇异

tagline.en: Sawshark — uses its saw-like snout to stun fish hiding in sand
tagline.zh: 锯鲨——用锯状吻部击晕藏在沙中的鱼

tagline.en: Fanfin anglerfish — covered in sensory filaments that detect the slightest motion
tagline.zh: 扇鳍鮟鱇——浑身感觉丝能探测最微小的动作

tagline.en: Netdevil — bioluminescent chin barbel branches like a glowing tree
tagline.zh: 网鬼——下颌须像发光的树一样分支

tagline.en: Rabbitfish — a living fossil with a venomous dorsal spine and ghostly eyes
tagline.zh: 银鲛——有毒背棘和幽灵般眼睛的活化石

tagline.en: Orange-spotted filefish — feeds exclusively on coral polyps one at a time
tagline.zh: 尖嘴单角鲀——一次只吃一个珊瑚虫

tagline.en: Long-nose butterflyfish — uses tweezers-like snout to extract prey from crevices
tagline.zh: 长嘴蝴蝶鱼——用镊子般的嘴从缝隙中取出猎物

tagline.en: Farms algae inside its own body — a solar-powered sea slug
tagline.zh: 在体内培养藻类——太阳能驱动的海蛞蝓

tagline.en: Spotted cleaner shrimp — dances to attract fish clients for cleaning
tagline.zh: 斑点清洁虾——跳舞吸引鱼类客户来清洁

tagline.en: Sexy shrimp — does a constant tail-wagging dance on sea anemones
tagline.zh: 性感虾——在海葵上不停地摇尾跳舞

tagline.en: Tiger pistol shrimp — snap creates a sonic boom hotter than the sun's surface
tagline.zh: 虎纹枪虾——弹指产生比太阳表面更热的音爆

tagline.en: Lives with a pistol shrimp partner — the shrimp digs, the goby keeps watch
tagline.zh: 与枪虾搭档——虾负责挖洞，虾虎鱼负责放哨

tagline.en: Tomato clownfish — born male, the dominant fish becomes female
tagline.zh: 番茄小丑鱼——生来为雄性，主导个体变为雌性

tagline.en: Ornate ghost pipefish — vanishes among crinoid feather stars
tagline.zh: 华丽剃刀鱼——在海百合的羽状臂中消失无踪

tagline.en: Seamoth — armored body and wing-like fins, walks on the sea floor
tagline.zh: 海蛾鱼——装甲身体和翼状鳍，在海底行走

tagline.en: Giant isopod — a deep-sea roly-poly the size of a football
tagline.zh: 大王具足虫——足球大小的深海鼠妇

tagline.en: Bigfin squid — elbow tentacles dangle like alien marionette strings in the abyss
tagline.zh: 大鳍鱿鱼——弯曲触手在深渊中垂挂如外星木偶线

viewingSpots.name: 蒙特雷湾 水族馆 (video exhibits)

tagline.en: Common stingray — buries itself in sand with only its eyes above
tagline.zh: 普通魟——把自己埋在沙里只露出眼睛

tagline.en: Marbled electric ray — stuns prey with 200-volt shocks
tagline.zh: 大理石电鳐——用200伏电击击晕猎物

tagline.en: Soldierfish — enormous eyes adapted for hunting in pitch darkness
tagline.zh: 金鳞鱼——巨大的眼睛适应在漆黑中捕猎

tagline.en: Pulsing coral — rhythmically opens and closes like a beating heart
tagline.zh: 脉动珊瑚——有节奏地开合如跳动的心脏

tagline.en: Salps — barrel-shaped jet engines that clone themselves into chains
tagline.zh: 樽海鞘——桶状喷气引擎，克隆自己连成链

tagline.en: Horn shark — lays corkscrew-shaped eggs wedged into rock crevices
tagline.zh: 角鲨——产下螺旋形卵塞入岩缝

tagline.en: Freshwater angelfish — tall, elegant, and one of the most kept aquarium fish
tagline.zh: 淡水神仙鱼——高挑优雅，最受欢迎的观赏鱼之一

tagline.en: Transparent Baikal oilfish — so fatty it melts in the sun after death
tagline.zh: 透明的贝加尔湖油鱼——油脂含量高到死后在阳光下会融化

tagline.en: Burrfish — permanently inflated spiny ball with big puppy-dog eyes
tagline.zh: 刺鲀——永远膨起的刺球配上大大的狗狗眼

tagline.en: One of the world's smallest fish — lives on a single gorgonian coral
tagline.zh: 世界上最小的鱼之一——生活在一株柳珊瑚上

tagline.en: The smallest baleen whale — curious and playful around boats
tagline.zh: 最小的须鲸——对船只充满好奇且爱嬉戏

tagline.en: The most widespread shark — electric blue skin fades after death
tagline.zh: 分布最广的鲨鱼——电蓝色皮肤在死后褪色

tagline.en: Goblin shark — shoots its jaw forward to snatch prey like a slingshot
tagline.zh: 哥布林鲨——像弹弓一样弹射下颌抓取猎物

viewingSpots.name: 蒙特雷湾 水族馆 (deep-sea exhibit)

tagline.en: Copperband butterflyfish — delicate beak probes crevices for worms
tagline.zh: 铜带蝴蝶鱼——纤细的喙探入缝隙寻找蠕虫

tagline.en: Fire dartfish — hovers above its burrow with a flicking dorsal flag
tagline.zh: 华丽线塘鳢——在洞口上方悬停，背鳍如旗飘扬

tagline.en: Frilled shark — a 'living fossil' that looks like a deep-sea serpent
tagline.zh: 皱鳃鲨——看起来像深海蛇的"活化石"

tagline.en: Opah — the only known fully warm-blooded fish, like a disco ball of the deep
tagline.zh: 月鱼——唯一已知的完全温血鱼类，如深海迪斯科球

tagline.en: Pram bug — hollows out a salp and rides it like a glass barrel through the abyss
tagline.zh: 冥虫——掏空樽海鞘，乘坐如玻璃桶穿越深渊

tagline.en: Ram's horn squid — has an internal coiled shell and a glowing tail light
tagline.zh: 旋壳乌贼——拥有内部螺旋壳和发光的尾灯

tagline.en: Longfin batfish — juveniles mimic dead leaves drifting on the surface
tagline.zh: 尖翅燕鱼——幼鱼模仿漂浮在水面的枯叶

tagline.en: Pennant coralfish — a trailing white dorsal banner like a medieval knight's flag
tagline.zh: 马夫鱼——拖曳的白色背鳍如中世纪骑士旗帜

tagline.en: Flying gurnard — spreads enormous pectoral fins like underwater wings
tagline.zh: 飞角鱼——展开巨大胸鳍如水下翅膀

tagline.en: Strawberry squid — one giant eye looks up, one tiny eye looks down
tagline.zh: 草莓鱿鱼——一只大眼朝上看，一只小眼朝下看

tagline.en: A living maze — the brain coral's grooves shelter tiny creatures
tagline.zh: 活的迷宫——脑珊瑚的沟壑庇护着微小生物

tagline.en: A free-living coral that can walk across the seafloor
tagline.zh: 能在海底行走的自由珊瑚

tagline.en: Elegant fan-shaped coral that sways with the current
tagline.zh: 随洋流摇曳的优雅扇形珊瑚

tagline.en: Not a true coral — its sting burns like fire
tagline.zh: 不是真正的珊瑚——它的刺痛如火烧

tagline.en: Inflates grape-like bubbles to capture sunlight
tagline.zh: 膨胀出葡萄般的气泡来捕获阳光

tagline.en: Its red skeleton resembles the pipes of an organ
tagline.zh: 红色骨骼如同管风琴的琴管

tagline.en: The only living coral with a permanent blue skeleton
tagline.zh: 唯一拥有永久蓝色骨骼的活珊瑚

tagline.en: Slow-growing deep-water coral prized for centuries — now protected
tagline.zh: 生长缓慢的深水珊瑚，曾被珍视数世纪——如今受保护

tagline.en: The precious gem of the deep — Mediterranean's living treasure
tagline.zh: 深海的珍贵宝石——地中海的活宝藏

tagline.en: The architect of Caribbean reefs — critically endangered icon
tagline.zh: 加勒比珊瑚礁的建筑师——极度濒危的标志物种

tagline.en: Soft, leathery coral that dominates Indo-Pacific reef flats
tagline.zh: 柔软的皮革珊瑚，主宰着印太地区的礁坪

tagline.en: Hundreds of tiny polyps bloom like an underwater flower garden
tagline.zh: 数百个小珊瑚虫如水下花园般绽放

tagline.en: Fleshy lobed brain coral that fluoresces under UV light
tagline.zh: 在紫外线下发出荧光的肉质脑珊瑚

tagline.en: Yellow scroll-like plates stack into dramatic underwater pagodas
tagline.zh: 黄色卷轴状板片堆叠成壮观的水下宝塔

tagline.en: Fast-growing branching coral, keystone reef builder
tagline.zh: 快速生长的分枝珊瑚，珊瑚礁关键建设者

tagline.en: Massive dome coral with maze-like grooves
tagline.zh: 大型穹顶珊瑚，表面有迷宫般的沟纹

tagline.en: Broad flat plates providing shelter for reef fish
tagline.zh: 宽阔的桌形板为珊瑚鱼提供庇护

tagline.en: Critically endangered Caribbean reef builder
tagline.zh: 极度濒危的加勒比礁石建设者

tagline.en: Elegant sea fan swaying in the current
tagline.zh: 优雅的海扇在水流中摇曳

tagline.en: Stinging hydrozoan that looks like branching coral
tagline.zh: 外形似珊瑚的刺胞水螅

tagline.en: Tall pillars rising from the reef floor
tagline.zh: 从礁石底部升起的高柱

tagline.en: Free-living solitary coral that walks across the seafloor
tagline.zh: 自由生活的独居珊瑚，能在海底行走

tagline.en: Dominant Caribbean reef-building coral
tagline.zh: 加勒比海主要的造礁珊瑚

tagline.en: Vibrant anemone hosting clownfish families
tagline.zh: 鲜艳的海葵，小丑鱼家族的家

tagline.en: Bubble-tipped anemone popular with clownfish
tagline.zh: 泡泡尖端海葵，小丑鱼的最爱

tagline.en: Giant barrel sponge, can live over 2000 years
tagline.zh: 巨型桶状海绵，寿命可超过2000年

tagline.en: Bright yellow tube sponge filtering reef water
tagline.zh: 鲜黄色管状海绵过滤珊瑚礁海水

tagline.en: Delicate purple sea fan anchored to the reef
tagline.zh: 固着在礁石上的纤细紫色海扇
